Sandbox_IsThriller_Range_tooltip: Zombies within this distance start the Thriller event: music plays and their speed gets rerolled.
Sandbox_IsThriller_SprintChance_tooltip: Chance for a zombie entering the radius to become a sprinter. Everyone else becomes a fast shambler.
Sandbox_IsThriller_MaxZombies_tooltip: During the first 3 minutes of MJ's appearance, additional zombies will spawn every minute outside the player's field of view. The spawn amount is randomized between 2 and this maximum cap, entering from the edge of the gathering radius.
Sandbox_IsThriller_MaxDancer_tooltip: How many dancer zombies appear alongside MJ when the Thriller stage begins. Dancers have 5x the health of a normal zombie and are also healed while MJ regenerates. Set to 0 to pick a random value between 2 and 5.
Sandbox_IsThriller_EventChance_tooltip: Chance per game minute to start the Thriller event when zombies are nearby. Doubled at night. A value of 1 means a 0.1% chance. Because this chance is checked every minute, set it as low as possible if you do not want the event to trigger too often.
Sandbox_IsThriller_EventCooldown_tooltip: After a Thriller event has played and ended successfully, wait this many in-game hours before the next one can start.
Sandbox_IsThriller_MaxWave_tooltip: How many songs play during one Thriller stage. Each song's intro also spawns one wave of extra crowd zombies every 2 seconds. When this many songs have finished, the stage fades out.
Sandbox_IsThriller_MusicOptionsDivider_t: You may select multiple tracks. When the Thriller event triggers, one selected track is chosen at random. This option is only a divider and has no effect by itself.
Sandbox_IsThriller_JustBeatIt_tooltip: Play Beat It instead of Thriller when MJ appears.
Sandbox_IsThriller_JustSmoothCriminal_to: Play Smooth Criminal instead of Thriller when MJ appears.
Sandbox_IsThriller_NoBodyCanBeatMeInBGM: Nobody can beat me in my BGM
Sandbox_IsThriller_NoBodyCanBeatMeInBGM_: Switch the mod to a mode where entering combat only plays a random MJ track, without triggering the zombie-horde gathering event.
